odoo_app: Live Chat + Helpdesk (omnichannel routing, VOIP voicemail)

capabilities.name: Presence-aware routing → queue → escalation
capabilities.verify: route_conversation_to_agent RPC + support-router edge function (migration 20260616170000); scratch-Postgres verified 2026-06-16 (least-loaded assignment, idempotent re-route, channel filter, queue fallback, escalation row, unknown-conv guard). Fixes the chat handoff that POSTed to a non-existent support-router (404).
capabilities.notes: Fas 0. Single routing primitive shared by chat handoff and future channel adapters (Law 1). Stage-3: live runtime verify + admin UI sign-off pending.

capabilities.name: Channel dimension + contact identity on conversations
capabilities.verify: chat_conversations.channel/.channel_thread_id/.contact_phone/.contact_id + support_agents.supported_channels (migration 20260616170000). Unified Inbox UI (already merged) reads these.
capabilities.notes: Fas 0. Lays the contract the merged Lovable UI is hardcoded against.

capabilities.name: Voicemail store
capabilities.verify: voicemail_messages table (migration 20260616170000); VoicemailPanel reads it. Transcription + analysis skill is Fas 2.
capabilities.notes: Fas 0 lays the table; handle_voicemail skill lands in Fas 2.

capabilities.name: Telegram inbound/outbound adapter
capabilities.verify: telegram-ingest webhook (inbound → conversation hub → FlowPilot reply) + contact-center skill manage_channel (getMe/setWebhook) + send_channel_message (outbound). Fas 1. Stage-3: live bot-token end-to-end test pending (needs a Telegram bot token); agent→Telegram outbound trigger on chat_messages role='agent' is the remaining wire.
capabilities.notes: Fas 1 differentiator. Inbound + FlowPilot round-trip built; live verify needs credentials.

capabilities.name: Callback offer + scheduling
capabilities.verify: request_callback RPC + skill (create/mark_attempted/list) riding bookings.metadata.kind='callback'; scratch-Postgres verified 2026-06-16. CallbacksPanel UI reads it. Fas 1.

capabilities.name: Voicemail → transcription → FlowPilot intent
capabilities.verify: handle_voicemail skill (contact-center fn): structured AI extraction of summary/intent/sentiment/callback_requested from a transcript via resolveAiConfig+callAiCompletion. Fas 1. Audio→transcript step lands with the voice channel (Fas 3).
capabilities.notes: Analysis of an existing transcript is done; speech-to-text needs the PSTN/voice channel.

capabilities.name: Two-way live voice (WebRTC/PSTN)
capabilities.verify: Deferred (Fas 3) — voice v1 is fallback-only (callback + voicemail) per product decision 2026-06-16
